title: Irish Roasted Pepper Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with roasted Irish peppers, crispy Padron peppers, and served in a crispy roasted pepper wrap.
instructions: 2. Roast the Irish pepper in the oven for 30-40 minutes, turning occasionally.
3. Slice the roasted pepper into strips.
4. Pan-fry the Padron peppers in a little oil until crispy.
5. Assemble the wrap by spreading the roasted pepper strips on the wrap, followed by the crispy Padron peppers.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
